description: Nice product, It is very useful for our organization
author: Johnponselin M.
pros: We can get expected reports with few clicks
cons: I am from Asia region so to get Support team is connectivity is limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Best app for work time and attendance
description: Ana from the support team was incredibly quick to respond to all our issues, from installation through monitoring. It was an excellent experience overall.
author: Adriaan S.
pros: The agent was very easy to install. We did experience a delay with installation on Macs, as it wasn’t feasible at that time, but the Worktime team managed to implement it successfully. Their support was responsive and helpful throughout the process, and overall the setup was smooth and efficient
cons: You really can’t physically remove an agent from a computer. When an employee leaves and is working remotely, there’s no way for admins to remove them from the monitoring list. The only workaround is to mark that person as “Do Not Monitor.”
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: It worked Great Until it Didnt. Lack of Customer Support Caused us to Cancel Service
description: Dont waste you money unless you are OK with weird errors in your data, and no response back to try and fix them.
author: BRAD H.
pros: We were able to Install to run silently on all users machines. Could have daily reports sent as csv files to feed into our analytics systems.
cons: The Software did not provide its own update mechanism. We were having some weird errors that did not make sense about what devices it was showing a user login time on. When choosing users to not monitor, the system kept adding them back, so we still had to pay for a license for them, even though the system was not collecting monitoring data from them. Reaching out to tech support provided no response. Even the CEO of the company ended up responding saying that he would check into it. But then failed to ever respond. This went on for 3 months with me sending him multiple emails, but he never responded. we ended up letting our subscription lapse because we would not ever get tech support to get back to us.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: it's easy to setup on client's laptop and it works silently happy with the product overall and they got multiple subscriptions to fit your need and budget
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: really great on tracking employee's performance and workday with automated reports making it easier to track performance daily
cons: the amount of data it provides make you sometimes get lost and the setup must be accurate to get accurate reporting
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Mostly positive to help identify where my time is being spent in a day but it's not always nice when you need to discuss work with a colleague or have a meeting and you can't track it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It keeps me accountable during the day and I can easily see what I am spending my time on during the day.
cons: It only tracks when you are working on your PC. When I have meetings it won't show as being productive.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: I love learning new things and even earning from it.
description: Até o momento tem sidSo far it has been quite calm, I have nothing to complain about.o bem tranquila não tenho do que reclamar.
author: Evaneide M.
pros: I like the work model; I am the type of person who learns things very quickly, so for me it has been excellent.
cons: I haven't had any bad experiences yet, but when I do, I will come back to talk about it regarding this point.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Fantastic tool for remote work control and sure for small offices/business
description: Used it for my office and it was really an eye opener. Having worked in several business environments as manager/owner, this tool is a must have.
author: Haris A.
pros: It is very simple to install and overall very easy to use. Minimum time for setup, almost no setup at all was needed.
cons: Haven't found anything i did not like just yet. I guess that as a drawback i could not find how to increase the 65% goal for productivity that is set as default. Maybe possible in other subscription modes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good product and best one we've tried
description: Our experience has been good, we're happy with the product and the price point when compared to others on the market
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The reports are easy to use and give you general overviews with the option to go into more detail if you need. The software is non invasive and gives us a rounded view to help us allocate time management better
cons: We'd like the ability to be able to download data into excel and review it but it can all be viewed in the interface
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: it gets better as time in-use and studying patterns of employees / continues to be a useful management tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use and intuitive set up, and the ability to review and manage separate teams and the additional reporting feathers
cons: initial set up guide and training was confusing but as you worked along it became intuitive and self-learning
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to work with, easy to install, easy to follow up on, great to work with, not too pricy and does the job!
author: Verified Reviewer

cons: Nothing really comes to mind. Maybe the loads of features find themselves to a dashboard that can be a little overwhelming.

review_title: BUY THIS INSTEAD and TRACK THE PRODUCTIVITY
description: Wonderful and again best tracking application that I have used in my career
author: Sachin D.
pros: Worktime really helps in tracking the productivity of the employees in a very nice manner and the best part is you can also see that within an hour how much time the employee is active or idle.
cons: Nothing, everything is just awesome. No complaints
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Perfect for growing teams, you can start for free to test it and when growing as a team change of plans
author: Victor German H.
pros: Easy to install on the computers, not invasive
cons: So far I have not found any, but the interface looks poor of design. It does not affect the functionality
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall its been a great experience and works very well for our organisation as a 'set and forget' configuration, that is feature rich
author: Jared W.
pros: Simple to use and understand with no real learning curve. It made it very easy to hand over the control to team managers once configured and reduce the IT burden.
cons: Its not the cheapest option on the market, but when it comes to getting what you pay for, WorkTime proves that a little extra upfront gives you returns by utilising less admin and IT time
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: A Great Innovative Solution to Employee Monitoring
author: Sam J.
pros: Worktime is an innovative solution to employee monitoring, that handles this sensitive topic in a professional & dignified manor. We have worked with a number of our customers who feel this type of product is required, using the multiple configuration options to ensure the required data is gathered in the least invasive way possible.
cons: There are no cons to report as of this moment in time - everyone on the team were really brilliant! .
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: WorkTime is an excellent productivity monitoring tool for organizations seeking to balance detailed insights with respect for employee privacy.
description: WorkTime offers a balanced approach to productivity monitoring, focusing on actionable insights without compromising user privacy. Its lightweight nature and straightforward setup make it appealing for both small teams and large organizations.
author: Aiden T.
pros: Privacy-Focused: Tracks productivity metrics without invasive methods like keystrokes or screenshots, fostering employee trust. Lightweight: Minimal impact on system performance, ensuring smooth operation without slowing down devices.
cons: No Real-Time Alerts: Lacks real-time notifications for productivity or inactivity thresholds.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: This is a great product and affordable too! The ease and clarity around the software have helped us incorporate it into the companys processes seaminglessly.Would reccomend to anyone to give it a try!
author: John S.
pros: WorkTime has been easy for us to implement as a company with minimal training or knowledge required. Customer service has been very responsive and helpful.
cons: Theres not much to complain about regarding WorkTime. However additional settings to tweak how breaks were logged would be beneficial.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I’ve had a really good experience with WorkTime. It’s a reliable and easy-to-use tool that makes tracking productivity, time, and team performance feel simple. The interface is clean and intuitive, so navigating through it and understanding the data is straightforward. It helps me keep an eye on workflows without feeling overwhelmed by too much information.
author: Rahul P.
pros: Tracking Active/Idea Time along with start and end time.
cons: It gets updated realtime. However, there are some delays which I have experienced. So that needs to be resolved.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: We love it! HIPAA compliant and noninvasive for our staff. Dry easy to deploy and track. We love the option to label websites and softwares that are productive or not.

pros: Secure but non invasive. Very easy to deploy across systems and set metrics for activity and productivity
cons: Settings can be complex at times but overall it was easy to figure out. There are times when the employee filter is a little glitchy.

author: Tomasz R.
pros: Simple, transparent and user -friendly. It gives great insight into the working time of employees.

review_title: A simple and effective time management tool.

author: Gili B.

cons: All the main features work great, but it would be awesome to have more options to customize reports for our business needs.

description: it is a good product, easy to use, and the dashboard is good
